title: Thicken & Durable Clothes Airer, Extra Large 4-Tier Capacity Foldable Clothes Drying Rack with Wheels, Stainless Steel Clothes Horse for Indoor/Outdoor Use in Bedroom, Laundry 50D x 76W x 171H
features: 【4 Tier Massive Clothes Airer】This clothes airer boasts an expansive 4-tier drying rack system with heavy-duty posts and 2 extendable side wings.The large clothes horse design provides exceptional space for drying everything from bulky bedding to delicate garments, making it ideal as a family-sized laundry rack. Compared to standard indoor clothes airers, our design offers 35% more drying area while maintaining a compact footprint.

【Space-Saving Foldable Design】Engineered for modern homes, our foldable clothes airer transforms from a full-capacity drying rack to a slim storage profile in seconds. Unlike conventional retractable washing lines, this innovative indoor folding airer saves valuable space in flats and small households. The clever vertical folding mechanism makes it perfect as a space-efficient clothes horse for contemporary living.

【Durable Material is Stronger】Built with heavy-duty clothes airer specifications, our unit features premium stainless steel tubing and industrial-strength ABS joints, Super heavy capacity. The weather-resistant finish ensures reliable performance whether used as an outdoor clothes airer or indoor drying rack. Far more durable than typical plastic clothes horses or basic laundry racks, this is built to last for years.

【Ultra-Stable & Safe Operation】The laundry drying rack incorporates 4 smooth-gliding casters (2 with locking brakes) and non-slip rubber feet. The innovative double-column base design provides superior stability compared to traditional washing racks, preventing any accidental tipping. Ideal for use as a kitchen drying rack or hallway organiser, it protects both your laundry and flooring.

【Versatile Multi-Scenario Use】This premium clothes airer effortlessly adapts to various settings - use it as a balcony drying station, laundry room organizer, or even a temporary garment display rack. The innovative design transitions seamlessly between being a spacious outdoor clothes horse in summer and a compact indoor airer during rainy days. Perfect for drying delicate knits on the upper tiers while airing shoes below, it's the ultimate all-purpose drying solution for modern households.
